title: Intentions

'''Intentions''' was a section of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. It interpreted and analyzed all information gathered by Alliance Intelligence and attempted to predict the intentions and moves of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Intentions agents required a keen eye for detail, endless patience, and the ability to see patterns and draw conclusions from incomplete data. Intentions agents were characterized as pale and skinny, with twitches, stooped shoulders, and google-eyes from staring at [[Computer/Legends|computer]] screens in poorly-lit conditions.<ref name="RASB" /> [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] was the [[Senior Intelligence Officer|Senior Officer]] of Intentions division around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="AIR" />

Intentions was further divided into four departments; [[Analysis (Alliance Intelligence)|Analysis]], [[Cryptology]], [[Equipment (Alliance Intelligence)|Equipment]], and [[Interrogation (Alliance Intelligence)|Interrogation]].<ref name="RASB" />
